        + u^9*(9*u^32 + 62*u^31 + 70*u^30 + 3*u^29 - 170*u^28 - 885*u^27 - 63*u^26 + 1659*u^25 - 3506*u^24 + 3558*u^23 + 946*u^22 - 11343*u^21 + 16071*u^20 - 6510*u^19 - 11956*u^18 + 24319*u^17 - 17632*u^16 - 2894*u^15 + 16933*u^14 - 18160*u^13 + 10421*u^12 + 1678*u^11 - 12327*u^10 + 13006*u^9 - 5841*u^8 - 1044*u^7 + 3282*u^6 - 2791*u^5 + 917*u^4 - 435*u^3 - 241*u^2 + 170*u - 120)*v^6
        + u^10*(20*u^30 + 106*u^29 + 145*u^28 + 40*u^27 - 193*u^26 + 107*u^25 + 960*u^24 - 377*u^23 + 1629*u^22 + 715*u^21 - 1893*u^20 + 5319*u^19 - 660*u^18 - 1561*u^17 + 5875*u^16 - 2380*u^15 + 1409*u^14 + 3544*u^13 - 3356*u^12 + 3889*u^11 + 1163*u^10 - 2306*u^9 + 3093*u^8 - 402*u^7 + 263*u^6 + 828*u^5 - 220*u^4 + 356*u^3 + 9*u^2 - 39*u + 45)*v^5
        + u^11*(5*u^29 + 41*u^28 + 69*u^27 + 7*u^26 - 139*u^25 - 75*u^24 + 53*u^23 - 233*u^22 + 280*u^21 - 283*u^20 - 672*u^19 + 921*u^18 - 434*u^17 - 477*u^16 + 510*u^15 - 962*u^14 + 215*u^13 + 203*u^12 - 1318*u^11 + 289*u^10 - 43*u^9 - 672*u^8 + 178*u^7 - 278*u^6 - 25*u^5 + 77*u^4 - 78*u^3 + 43*u^2 + 15*u - 10)*v^4
        + u^12*(u + 1)*(4*u^26 + 7*u^25 - 19*u^24 - 47*u^23 - 84*u^21 - 81*u^20 + 48*u^19 - 270*u^18 - 47*u^17 - 23*u^16 - 280*u^15 + 62*u^14 - 158*u^13 - 202*u^12 + 137*u^11 - 173*u^10 - 140*u^9 + 61*u^8 - 156*u^7 + 20*u^6 - 55*u^5 - 65*u^4 + 6*u^3 - 16*u^2 - 7*u + 1)*v^3
        + u^14*(u + 1)^2*(u^23 + 5*u^22 - 2*u^21 + 9*u^20 + 21*u^19 - 14*u^18 + 36*u^17 + 26*u^16 + 13*u^15 + 75*u^14 + 6*u^13 + 46*u^12 + 68*u^11 + 18*u^10 + 52*u^9 + 59*u^8 + 5*u^7 + 57*u^6 + 5*u^5 + 18*u^4 + 18*u^3 + 2*u + 1)*v^2
        - u^18*(u + 1)^3*(u^4 - u^3 + u^2 - u + 1)*(u^6 + u^5 + u^4 + u^3 + u^2 + u + 1)*(3*u^6 - 2*u^5 + 9*u^3 - u^2 + 2*u + 2)*v
        + u^22*(u + 1)^4*(u^4 - u^3 + u^2 - u + 1)*(u^6 + u^5 + u^4 + u^3 + u^2 + u + 1);
x:=-v;
G:=1/u;
y:=(20*G^44*x^29-163*G^44*x^28+570*G^44*x^27-1100*G^44*x^26+1240*G^44*x^25-770*G^44*x^24+196*G^44*x^23-20*G^44*x^22+100*G^44*x^21-115*G^44*x^20+50*G^44*x^19-8*G^44*x^18-19*G^43*x^35+268*G^43*x^34-1629*G^43*x^33+5643*G^43*x^32-12462*G^43*x^31+18876*G^43*x^30-21500*G^43*x^29+21231*G^43*x^28-19981*G^43*x^27+16444*G^43*x^26-10509*G^43*x^25+5648*G^43*x^24-3349*G^43*x^23+1990*G^43*x^22-920*G^43*x^21+469*G^43*x^20-326*G^43*x^19+182*G^43*x^18-82*G^43*x^17+33*G^43*x^16-7*G^43*x^15+18*G^42*x^37-289*G^42*x^36+2037*G^42*x^35-8514*G^42*x^34+24485*G^42*x^33-54076*G^42*x^32+98506*G^42*x^31-149094*G^42*x^30+180002*G^42*x^29-167186*G^42*x^28+121339*G^42*x^27-74460*G^42*x^26+37840*G^42*x^25-8009*G^42*x^24-7706*G^42*x^23+6039*G^42*x^22-211*G^42*x^21-292*G^42*x^20-1390*G^42*x^19+1436*G^42*x^18-443*G^42*x^17-154*G^42*x^16+146*G^42*x^15-17*G^42*x^14-7*G^42*x^13-18*G^41*x^37+408*G^41*x^36-3903*G^41*x^35+21191*G^41*x^34-74009*G^41*x^33+179084*G^41*x^32-317365*G^41*x^31+431524*G^41*x^30-462603*G^41*x^29+378273*G^41*x^28-188411*G^41*x^27-33870*G^41*x^26+185747*G^41*x^25-224968*G^41*x^24+191609*G^41*x^23-139808*G^41*x^22+93137*G^41*x^21-56688*G^41*x^20+32398*G^41*x^19-18681*G^41*x^18+10273*G^41*x^17-3995*G^41*x^16+596*G^41*x^15+4*G^41*x^14+141*G^41*x^13-66*G^41*x^12+16*G^40*x^38-237*G^40*x^37+1348*G^40*x^36-2919*G^40*x^35-5129*G^40*x^34+52226*G^40*x^33-166660*G^40*x^32+310104*G^40*x^31-335713*G^40*x^30+68045*G^40*x^29+514844*G^40*x^28-1182064*G^40*x^27+1614963*G^40*x^26-1698404*G^40*x^25+1545280*G^40*x^24-1263279*G^40*x^23+904563*G^40*x^22-582146*G^40*x^21+385240*G^40*x^20-263200*G^40*x^19+150178*G^40*x^18-64018*G^40*x^17+23797*G^40*x^16-8883*G^40*x^15+2521*G^40*x^14-1060*G^40*x^13+866*G^40*x^12-279*G^40*x^11-16*G^39*x^38+357*G^39*x^37-3208*G^39*x^36+15338*G^39*x^35-43195*G^39*x^34+78706*G^39*x^33-132383*G^39*x^32+351752*G^39*x^31-1034309*G^39*x^30+2347781*G^39*x^29-4062873*G^39*x^28+5622399*G^39*x^27-6352349*G^39*x^26+5841428*G^39*x^25-4493850*G^39*x^24+3270192*G^39*x^23-2551110*G^39*x^22+19 *x+160*G^19+19*G^18*x^33-608*G^18*x^32+5453*G^18*x^31-17841*G^18*x^30-3135*G^18*x^29+131480*G^18*x^28+61161*G^18*x^27-2438099*G^18*x^26+9462931*G^18*x^25-20600541*G^18*x^24+30425745*G^18*x^23-32984703*G^18*x^22+28460518*G^18*x^21-22966459*G^18*x^20+20358367*G^18*x^19-17836364*G^18*x^18+12175447*G^18*x^17-5028483*G^18*x^16-1338588*G^18*x^15+8089402*G^18*x^14-16160203*G^18*x^13+22482054*G^18*x^12-23080573*G^18*x^11+17983519*G^18*x^10-10758332*G^18*x^9+4875172*G^18*x^8-1659802*G^18*x^7+462061*G^18*x^6-111625*G^18*x^5+9690*G^18*x^4+1824*G^18*x^3+3800*G^18*x^2+1254*G^18*x+152*G^18-18*G^17*x^33+432*G^17*x^32-4878*G^17*x^31+33696*G^17*x^30-155628*G^17*x^29+522630*G^17*x^28-1508292*G^17*x^27+4451832*G^17*x^26-12694680*G^17*x^25+29762982*G^17*x^24-53840754*G^17*x^23+76553280*G^17*x^22-90657360*G^17*x^21+95549130*G^17*x^20-93157740*G^17*x^19+84630492*G^17*x^18-73561104*G^17*x^17+65853918*G^17*x^16-62601462*G^17*x^15+57561642*G^17*x^14-44994636*G^17*x^13+26953956*G^17*x^12-10723194*G^17*x^11+1360206*G^17*x^10+1631934*G^17*x^9-1525806*G^17*x^8+750582*G^17*x^7-215208*G^17*x^6+28098*G^17*x^5-8586*G^17*x^4+3924*G^17*x^3+2988*G^17*x^2+1404*G^17*x+162*G^17-119*G^16*x^32+2176*G^16*x^31-16949*G^16*x^30+76976*G^16*x^29-245242*G^16*x^28+663884*G^16*x^27-1820547*G^16*x^26+5210432*G^16*x^25-13821714*G^16*x^24+30316355*G^16*x^23-52666561*G^16*x^22+73211962*G^16*x^21-84677289*G^16*x^20+85208114*G^16*x^19-76810437*G^16*x^18+63622262*G^16*x^17-52121031*G^16*x^16+47239090*G^16*x^15-46872315*G^16*x^14+44030646*G^16*x^13-34981971*G^16*x^12+22466520*G^16*x^11-11455654*G^16*x^10+4619461*G^16*x^9-1537446*G^16*x^8+460088*G^16*x^7-110670*G^16*x^6+11220*G^16*x^5-7378*G^16*x^4+5151*G^16*x^3+2261*G^16*x^2+1292*G^16*x+204*G^16-192*G^15*x^31+2832*G^15*x^30-14096*G^15*x^29+6304*G^15*x^28+227264*G^15*x^27-1114160*G^15*x^26+2645680*G^15*x^25-3294784*G^15*x^24+331344*G^15*x^23+7664464*G^15*x^22-18545552*G^15*x^21+27644912*G^15*x^20-31305168*G^15*x^19+28980512*G^15*x^18-22543408*G^15*x^17+15084960*G^15*x^16-9955040*G^15*x^15+8964896*G^15*x^14-10852416*G^15*x^13+12369984*G^15*x^12-11377744*G^15*x^11+8317424*G^15*x^10-4845280*G^15*x^9+2222240*G^15*x^8-805232*G^15*x^7+257136*G^15*x^6-85104*G^15*x^5+14736*G^15*x^4+1120*G^15*x^3+2704*G^15*x^2+928*G^15*x+224*G^15+330*G^14*x^30-6435*G^14*x^29+60510*G^14*x^28-363075*G^14*x^27+1509045*G^14*x^26-4443135*G^14*x^25+9360060*G^14*x^24-14304585*G^14*x^23+16307625*G^14*x^22-14937390*G^14*x^21+13051395*G^14*x^20-12860100*G^14*x^19+13262475*G^14*x^18-12406920*G^14*x^17+10866330*G^14*x^16-10409790*G^14*x^15+10877430*G^14*x^14-10170510*G^14*x^13+7101030*G^14*x^12-2972895*G^14*x^11-38820*G^14*x^10+1141725*G^14*x^9-995085*G^14*x^8+515535*G^14*x^7-170145*G^14*x^6+28395*G^14*x^5-10080*G^14*x^4+4755*G^14*x^3+1905*G^14*x^2+795*G^14*x+180*G^14+14*G^13*x^30+1162*G^13*x^29-21938*G^13*x^28+173502*G^13*x^27-819966*G^13*x^26+2657564*G^13*x^25-6317514*G^13*x^24+11351172*G^13*x^23-15730120*G^13*x^22+17593898*G^13*x^21-17812690*G^13*x^20+18949476*G^13*x^19-20996122*G^13*x^18+20739278*G^13*x^17-16665964*G^13*x^16+11745902*G^13*x^15-9480814*G^13*x^14+9530626*G^13*x^13-9096878*G^13*x^12+6812890*G^13*x^11-3728718*G^13*x^10+1404900*G^13*x^9-311178*G^13*x^8+17010*G^13*x^7+13244*G^13*x^6-10010*G^13*x^5-3962*G^13*x^4+3108*G^13*x^3+1414*G^13*x^2+714*G^13*x+126*G^13+52*G^12*x^29+559*G^12*x^28-18694*G^12*x^27+162929*G^12*x^26-755105*G^12*x^25+2217553*G^12*x^24-4484714*G^12*x^23+6536010*G^12*x^22-7158294*G^12*x^21+6598228*G^12*x^20-6668727*G^12*x^19+8290672*G^12*x^18-9676043*G^12*x^17+8406138*G^12*x^16-4916197*G^12*x^15+2168491*G^12*x^14-1869907*G^12*x^13+2815995*G^12*x^12-3132285*G^12*x^11+2399436*G^12*x^10-1330888*G^12*x^9+556920*G^12*x^8-173004*G^12*x^7+46254*G^12*x^6-21177*G^12*x^5+3640*G^12*x^4+429*G^12*x^3+1092*G^12*x^2+546*G^12*x+104*G^12-276*G^11*x^27-348*G^11*x^26+27984*G^11*x^25-177300*G^11*x^24+511344*G^11*x^23-729948*G^11*x^22+162948*G^11*x^21+1342452*G^11*x^20-2626512*G^11*x^19+2280096*G^11*x^18-647772*G^11*x^17-355752*G^11*x^16-328176*G^11*x^15+1689480*G^11*x^14-2140824*G^11*x^13+1382928*G^11*x^12-321732*G^11*x^11-277800*G^11*x^10+367512*G^11*x^9-239544*G^11*x^8+118800*G^11*x^7-42072*G^11*x^6+4524*G^11*x^5-2796*G^11*x^4+1980*G^11*x^3+348*G^11*x^2+360*G^11*x+96*G^11-231*G^10*x^27+1969*G^10*x^26-3399*G^10*x^25-20537*G^10*x^24+140591*G^10*x^23-482713*G^10*x^22+1209439*G^10*x^21-2366485*G^10*x^20+3604040*G^10*x^19-4161201*G^10*x^18+3535983*G^10*x^17-2239061*G^10*x^16+1363032*G^10*x^15-1351768*G^10*x^14+1678248*G^10*x^13-1657073*G^10*x^12+1166759*G^10*x^11-567523*G^10*x^10+164571*G^10*x^9+3982*G^10*x^8-28446*G^10*x^7+18249*G^10*x^6-10560*G^10*x^5+583*G^10*x^4+924*G^10*x^3+407*G^10*x^2+143*G^10*x+77*G^10-390*G^9*x^26+4750*G^9*x^25-22370*G^9*x^24+50540*G^9*x^23-35420*G^9*x^22-139170*G^9*x^21+581340*G^9*x^20-1241060*G^9*x^19+1841090*G^9*x^18-2012180*G^9*x^17+1575280*G^9*x^16-802580*G^9*x^15+253580*G^9*x^14-205510*G^9*x^13+430020*G^9*x^12-550350*G^9*x^11+434300*G^9*x^10-227730*G^9*x^9+82700*G^9*x^8-15330*G^9*x^7-630*G^9*x^6-1070*G^9*x^5-750*G^9*x^4+470*G^9*x^3+370*G^9*x^2+60*G^9*x+40*G^9-270*G^8*x^25+3924*G^8*x^24-23976*G^8*x^23+85230*G^8*x^22-205533*G^8*x^21+349893*G^8*x^20-390366*G^8*x^19+201825*G^8*x^18+144099*G^8*x^17-377136*G^8*x^16+283347*G^8*x^15+40104*G^8*x^14-265743*G^8*x^13+221985*G^8*x^12-40374*G^8*x^11-83943*G^8*x^10+90918*G^8*x^9-46737*G^8*x^8+19476*G^8*x^7-7965*G^8*x^6+1737*G^8*x^5-1251*G^8*x^4+594*G^8*x^3+90*G^8*x^2+63*G^8*x+9*G^8-24*G^7*x^24+920*G^7*x^23-9432*G^7*x^22+46760*G^7*x^21-145344*G^7*x^20+311808*G^7*x^19-461424*G^7*x^18+451632*G^7*x^17-263680*G^7*x^16+62760*G^7*x^15-12192*G^7*x^14+96296*G^7*x^13-164968*G^7*x^12+134352*G^7*x^11-58984*G^7*x^10+7592*G^7*x^9+6512*G^7*x^8-1152*G^7*x^7-1360*G^7*x^6-320*G^7*x^5+56*G^7*x^4+96*G^7*x^3+72*G^7*x^2+24*G^7*x+7*G^6*x^24+112*G^6*x^23-1393*G^6*x^22+3710*G^6*x^21+2310*G^6*x^20-34769*G^6*x^19+102249*G^6*x^18-175014*G^6*x^17+188475*G^6*x^16-121548*G^6*x^15+36981*G^6*x^14-2261*G^6*x^13+20258*G^6*x^12-43967*G^6*x^11+38857*G^6*x^10-18788*G^6*x^9+5411*G^6*x^8-91*G^6*x^7+21*G^6*x^6-1015*G^6*x^5+483*G^6*x^4-77*G^6*x^3+49*G^6*x^2+24*G^5*x^23-12*G^5*x^22-1560*G^5*x^21+7794*G^5*x^20-15714*G^5*x^19+13950*G^5*x^18+4452*G^5*x^17-30714*G^5*x^16+40890*G^5*x^15-22650*G^5*x^14-3336*G^5*x^13+13158*G^5*x^12-5562*G^5*x^11-6204*G^5*x^10+8988*G^5*x^9-4302*G^5*x^8+786*G^5*x^7+420*G^5*x^6-636*G^5*x^5+246*G^5*x^4-24*G^5*x^3+6*G^5*x^2+30*G^4*x^22-205*G^4*x^21-180*G^4*x^20+4130*G^4*x^19-12275*G^4*x^18+17670*G^4*x^17-13460*G^4*x^16+1520*G^4*x^15+7580*G^4*x^14-4815*G^4*x^13-4105*G^4*x^12+8320*G^4*x^11-6265*G^4*x^10+1750*G^4*x^9+1060*G^4*x^8-990*G^4*x^7+310*G^4*x^6-100*G^4*x^5+25*G^4*x^4+16*G^3*x^21-180*G^3*x^20+604*G^3*x^19-4*G^3*x^18-3348*G^3*x^17+7408*G^3*x^16-8176*G^3*x^15+4792*G^3*x^14-136*G^3*x^13-1532*G^3*x^12-96*G^3*x^11+1600*G^3*x^10-1692*G^3*x^9+1064*G^3*x^8-356*G^3*x^7+36*G^3*x^6+3*G^2*x^20-48*G^2*x^19+360*G^2*x^18-819*G^2*x^17+501*G^2*x^16+663*G^2*x^15-1476*G^2*x^14+1326*G^2*x^13-462*G^2*x^12-318*G^2*x^11+408*G^2*x^10-201*G^2*x^9+90*G^2*x^8-27*G^2*x^7+6*G*x^18+50*G*x^17-250*G*x^16+398*G*x^15-302*G*x^14+134*G*x^13-44*G*x^12+26*G*x^11-52*G*x^10+48*G*x^9-14*G*x^8+4*x^17-9*x^16-4*x^15+26*x^14-24*x^13+6*x^12+4*x^11-6*x^10+4*x^9-x^8)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
